items.prompt: Why is entropy = disorder an incomplete definition?
items.initial_response: Entropy measures how disordered a system is.
items.revised_response: Disorder is an intuition; entropy is related to the number of accessible microstates.

mastered: Entropy should not be reduced to the word disorder.
unstable: Formal relation between entropy and microstate count.
next_session: Apply the concept to a mixing example.

cards.front: Why is entropy = disorder an incomplete definition?
cards.back: Entropy is a thermodynamic and statistical quantity related to accessible microstates; disorder is only an intuition.
